title: AWS の 503 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most factual claims are well-supported by official AWS documentation or relevant RFCs.
The article provides practical AWS CLI commands that align with official documentation.
The explanation of 503 causes and resolutions is generally accurate and comprehensive.
The freshness of some linked articles, especially for CloudWatch Logs Live Tail, might be slightly dated but the core functionality described remains valid. The article itself is recent (May 2026).
One claim regarding API Gateway throttling incorrectly stated a 503 error, when it should be a 429.
The article effectively covers various AWS services and common scenarios for 503 errors.

sources.title: RFC 7231 - Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP/1.1): Semantics and Content
sources.claim: The 503 (Service Unavailable) status code indicates that the server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary overload or scheduled maintenance, which will likely be alleviated after some delay.

sources.title: 503 Service Unavailable - HTTP - MDN Web Docs
sources.claim: The HTTP 503 Service Unavailable server error response status code indicates that the server is not ready to handle the request. Common causes are that a server is down for maintenance or overloaded.

sources.title: AWS CLI V2でCloudWatch Logsのロググループをtailできるようになりました！ - DevelopersIO
sources.claim: AWS CLI v2を利用すると $tail -f 相当のことが $aws logs tail --follow LOG-GROUP-NAME で出来るようになりました。

sources.title: Amazon S3 が新しいリクエストレートに合わせて自動的にスケールするようになりました - AWS News Blog
sources.claim: Amazon S3 はプレフィックスをリクエスト率に合わせて最適化するため、独自のキー命名パターンはベストプラクティスではありません。Amazon S3 のパフォーマンス最適化の詳細については、「Amazon S3 のパフォーマンスガイドライン」と「Amazon S3 のパフォーマンス設計パターン」を参照してください。

sources.title: Amazon S3 で発生する HTTP 5xx エラーのトラブルシューティング | AWS re:Post
sources.claim: エラーメッセージ '503 Slow Down' は通常、S3 バケットが受信するリクエスト数が多い場合に表示されます。パーティション化された Amazon S3 のプレフィックスごとに、1 秒あたり 3,500 件の PUT/COPY/POST/DELETE リクエストまたは 5,500 件の GET/HEAD リクエストを送信できます。ただし、リクエストが AWS リージョン間のコピーに利用できる帯域幅を超過した場合、Amazon S3 は応答 '503 Slow Down' を返す可能性があります。

sources.title: Viewing CloudWatch logs for Lambda functions - AWS Documentation
sources.claim: You can view Amazon CloudWatch logs for your Lambda function using the Lambda console, the CloudWatch console, or the AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI).

sources.title: GetServiceGraph - AWS X-Ray
sources.claim: Retrieves a document that describes services that process incoming requests, and downstream services that they call as a result.

sources.title: get-service-graph — AWS CLI 2.35.4 Command Reference
sources.claim: Retrieves a document that describes services that process incoming requests, and downstream services that they call as a result.

sources.title: Access logs for your Application Load Balancer - AWS Documentation
sources.claim: Elastic Load Balancing provides access logs that capture detailed information about requests sent to your load balancer. Each log contains information such as the time the request was received, the client's IP address, latencies, request paths, and server responses.

sources.title: Configuring concurrent executions - AWS Lambda
sources.claim: By default, Lambda limits the total concurrent executions across all functions in your AWS account per Region. The default concurrent execution limit is 1,000 for most Regions.

sources.title: GetAccountSettings - AWS Lambda
sources.claim: Returns the resource limits for an account. These limits apply to things such as the maximum size of your Lambda functions, or the maximum number of concurrent executions that can be run.

sources.title: PutFunctionConcurrency - AWS Lambda
sources.claim: Sets the maximum number of concurrent executions for a function, and reserves capacity for it.

sources.title: DeleteFunctionConcurrency - AWS Lambda
sources.claim: Deletes the provisioned concurrency configuration for a function.

sources.title: Increase max connections of my RDS for MySQL or PostgreSQL instance | AWS re:Post
sources.claim: The max_connections parameter sets the maximum number of database connections for both RDS for MySQL and RDS for PostgreSQL. The default value of max_connections depends on the instance class that the Amazon RDS instance uses. A DB instance class with more available memory can have a larger number of database connections.

sources.title: Quotas and constraints for Amazon RDS - Amazon Relational Database Service
sources.claim: You can determine the max_connections value for your DB MariaDB or MySQL DB instance by connecting to it and running the following SQL command: SHOW GLOBAL VARIABLES LIKE 'max_connections';

sources.title: ModifyDBParameterGroup - Amazon Relational Database Service
sources.claim: Modifies the parameters of a DB parameter group. To modify more than one parameter, submit a list of the following: ParameterName, ParameterValue, and ApplyMethod.

sources.title: ModifyDBInstance - Amazon Relational Database Service
sources.claim: Modifies settings for a DB instance. You can change one or more database configuration parameters by specifying these parameters and the new values in the request.

sources.title: Read/write capacity mode - Amazon DynamoDB
sources.claim: DynamoDB has two read/write capacity modes for processing reads and writes on your tables: on-demand and provisioned. On-demand capacity mode is a flexible billing option where you pay for the data reads and writes your application performs. Provisioned capacity mode is where you specify the number of reads and writes per second that you expect your application to perform.

sources.title: UpdateTable - Amazon DynamoDB
sources.claim: Modifies the provisioned throughput settings, global secondary indexes, or DynamoDB Streams settings for a specified table.

sources.title: Application Load Balancer からの 503 エラーのトラブルシューティング | AWS re:Post
sources.claim: 一貫した HTTP 503 エラーは、ALB からリクエストを受信する準備ができているターゲットが不足していることを意味します。

sources.title: ELBからHTTP 503が返された時の調査 - iret.media
sources.claim: セキュリティグループのルールは正しいか？、再確認します。 ヘルスチェックはHealthyですか？、再確認します。必要に応じて、EC2 or ECS のWebサーバーや設定を確認します。

sources.title: Quotas for Amazon API Gateway - Amazon API Gateway
sources.claim: API Gateway throttles requests to your API to prevent it from being overwhelmed by too many requests. When the request submissions exceed the steady-state request rate and burst limits, API Gateway begins to throttle requests. Clients receive 429 Too Many Requests error responses.

sources.title: Integrate a Lambda function with an API Gateway REST API - Amazon API Gateway
sources.claim: A Lambda function timeout (default 3 seconds), insufficient memory, or insufficient execution role (IAM Role) permissions can cause function failure.

sources.title: Monitoring Lambda functions with CloudWatch Logs - AWS Documentation
sources.claim: Lambda sends logs from your functions to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. You can use CloudWatch Logs to monitor and troubleshoot your functions.

sources.title: HTTP 503 ステータスコード (Service Unavailable) - Amazon CloudFront
sources.claim: Lambda@Edge の制限超過。 Lambda@Edge または CloudFront Functions の実行エラー。

sources.title: Optimizing Amazon S3 performance - Amazon Simple Storage Service
sources.claim: Amazon S3 automatically scales to high request rates, and your application can achieve thousands of transactions per second in a single bucket. Amazon S3 automatically scales to high request rates, and your application can achieve thousands of transactions per second in a single bucket. S3 automatically scales to high request rates, and your application can achieve thousands of transactions per second in a single bucket.

sources.title: Troubleshooting S3 HTTP 503 Slow Down Errors - AWS re:Post
sources.claim: S3 automatically scales to high request rates. However, if your application exceeds the available bandwidth for copies between AWS Regions, S3 might respond with a '503 Slow Down' error.

unsupported_claims: EC2 / ECS バックエンドインスタンスがダウンしている
`aws elbv2 describe-target-health` コマンドの出力例が示されています。
`sudo systemctl status nginx` または `sudo systemctl status apache2` でウェブサーバーのステータスを確認。
`sudo tail -f /var/log/nginx/error.log` または `sudo tail -f /var/log/httpd/error_log` でサーバーログを確認。
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.
Optional improvement: Correct the claim about API Gateway throttling returning a 503 error to accurately state it returns a 429 Too Many Requests error.
Optional improvement: Consider updating some external blog references with newer or more official AWS documentation if available, although current ones are still relevant.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
